codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses both prior blocking failures: restore now supports a DEV-only ws:// opt-in scoped to restoreProfileFromRelay for local-relay e2e, and relay querying was refactored into true parallel fan-out with per-relay timeout semantics so a hung earlier relay no longer starves later relays. Existing user-facing wss:// validation and canonical error paths remain intact.

summary: Reviewed the fix feature transcript skeleton, handoff, prior failed review, and both commit diffs (original and fix). The fix is adequate: it resolves the ws:// local-relay test blockage without relaxing end-user validation, and it resolves the sequential relay-starvation bug via parallel per-relay attempts with focused test coverage.
